=== 489669 ===
### 489669 | res=2026-03-26 | string (name)
Q: Which England defender will score the hosts' only goal and later concede a stoppage-time penalty in the men's friendly against Uruguay at Wembley by 28 March 2026?
BG: Question Start Date: 2026-03-19. England is scheduled to host Uruguay in a senior men's international friendly at Wembley as part of preparations for the 2026 FIFA World Cup. International friendlies are matches used to test players and tactics before major tournaments.
RC: Source of Truth : The question will resolve using the official Football Association or FIFA match report for the senior men's England vs Uruguay friendly at Wembley, with Reuters or AP match reports as backup if needed. Resolution Date : The question resolves when the match is completed and the official reports are publicly available, expected by 28 March 2026. Accepted Answer Format : The answer must be the full name of the England player who is officially credited with England's goal and is identified in match reporting as the player whose foul led to Uruguay's awarded stoppage-time penalty.
  PRED: {'Marc Guehi': 0.14, 'John Stones': 0.12, 'Ezri Konsa': 0.08, 'Levi Colwill': 0.07, 'Dan Burn': 0.05}
=== 79608 ===
### 79608 | res=2026-03-26 | string (city)
Q: What Iranian city will see six people killed after air raids hit three residential houses on March 27, 2026?
BG: Question Start Date: 2026-03-20. Fighting involving Iran, Israel, and the United States is ongoing, and strikes on Iranian cities are possible. Civilian neighborhoods may be affected, and major news outlets and local officials are expected to identify the locations of major incidents.
RC: Source of Truth : This question resolves based on reporting published on or about March 27, 2026 from Al Jazeera and the local Iranian media or official statements cited in such reporting, identifying the city where Friday air raids on three residential houses killed six people. Resolution Date : March 27, 2026, when the affected city is clearly named in public reporting. Accepted Answer Format : The answer must be the city name only, in English transliteration, with no province or country added.
  PRED: {'Tehran': 0.28, 'Isfahan': 0.1, 'Shiraz': 0.08, 'Tabriz': 0.06, 'Karaj': 0.05}
=== 659262 ===
### 659262 | res=2026-03-26 | string (name)
Q: Who will be identified in verified reporting by March 29, 2026, as the Israeli Premier League footballer shown opening fire in southern Lebanon?
BG: Question Start Date: 2026-03-14. Fighting involving Israel and Lebanon is drawing intense international attention. Professional footballers in Israel can also serve as military reservists, so any verified footage linking an active top-flight player to combat would likely become a major football and political story.
RC: Source of Truth : This question resolves based on verified reporting published by March 29, 2026, that explicitly identifies the footballer in the footage, with primary weight given to major international news reports and any corroborating public statement from the player’s club or relevant football authorities. Resolution Date : The question resolves on March 29, 2026, or earlier if the player’s identity is publicly established before that date. Accepted Answer Format : The answer must be the player’s full name in standard English spelling as given in the confirming reports.
  PRED: {'Eliel Peretz': 0.02, 'Dolev Haziza': 0.02}
